title: Savory Peruvian Potato Causa Limena
description: A garlicky, velvety cold potato dish with a sweet molasses twist, perfect for a quick weeknight meal.
instructions: Wash and peel the potatoes, then cut them into cubes.
Boil the potato cubes in salted water until tender, about 20 minutes.
Drain the potatoes and allow them to cool, then mash them until smooth and velvety.
Whisk the molasses, olive oil, lime juice, ají amarillo paste, salt, and pepper until fully blended.
Fold the sauce into the mashed potatoes, mixing until the potatoes are evenly coated.
Fold in the diced avocado and gently mix to keep the avocado pieces intact.
Divide the mixture into four chilled serving glasses or molds.
Top each serving with a drizzle of olive oil and a sprinkle of fresh cilantro, if desired.
